docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER FILING FEE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAIGHT, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT PAW'KET PAW'LOUR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-20-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUENNA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JUAN GALVEZ--OWNER OF THE BUSINESS. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAIGHT, STEPHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAW'KET PAW'LOUR PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE TO THE SATSIFACTION OF THE COURT THAT THE SHAMPOO AT ISSUE CAUSED HIS DOG'S EYE INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
